comments.body: have u added the required libraries for it...
@user1362513 As Abhinav mentioned you should add the groovy library to classpath
i have added the ireport plugin to net beans. is there any need for adding groovy library to classpath??
Possible duplicate: stackoverflow.com/questions/8935925/jasperreports-compile-er‌​ror & stackoverflow.com/questions/1576532/… & stackoverflow.com/questions/4233310/…

answers.body:
As indicated by Alex K you can see this post:

JasperReports compilation error

That worked for me.

You could also add the jar libraries to iReport classpath. That can be done through Window-> Options -> iReport -> Classpath tab.

Adding the libraries to the project will not solve this issue.

title: Compile error in jasper report-Error filling print
body:
